testcase.name: test_get_birth_record_returns_empty_when_none
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_birth_record_133.py:46: in test_get_birth_record_returns_empty_when_none assert response.status_code == 200, f"GET failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: GET failed: {"detail":"Invalid session"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_birth_record_invalid_client
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_birth_record_133.py:59: in test_get_birth_record_invalid_client assert response.status_code == 404, f"Expected 404, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 404, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid session"} E assert 401 == 404 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
